entry.title: Can you upload employees as alumni (OBX-31773)?
entry.content: Is it possible to load employees into SuccessFactors and designate them as alumni?

entry.title: How to convert .PPTX to PDF
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there any way to convert ppt to pdf in abap.

 

By using OLE can we achieve it? Thanks in advance for your response 

 

Mahanth

entry.title: Re: no SDBSETUP.EXE in Max DB update form SAP
entry.content:
Hello Birgit,
thank you for the information, on Windows it's easy to get confused

SAP note 2300026 explains this change, but the title refers to Linux only
In Database Studio 7.9.11 for Windows, the README still refers to SDBSETUP for installation

Could you please update this informations ?
Best Regards,
Valerio

entry.title: Re: Unable to configure trusted RFC no matter what
entry.content:
Dear Vera, I made quite some effort - updated the Kernel of the Solution Manager system to version 7.54 Patch 500. I have also implemented the following notes:

1. Implement SAP Note 3257359 - SNOTE: To allow object overwriting if there is no customer modification
2. Implement SAP Note 3304520 - Trusted trusting
3. Implement TCI note 3089413
4. Implement the latest version of SAP Note 3287611

In the end, I have launched the migration of RFC destinations in transaction SMT1 on the Solution Manager system. For the system to which we need to have working trusted RFC destinations, the job log says: Uses new method already. However when I click Login, the same error message 00024 keeps showing up 😞 Please advise how to fix this! Thank you!

entry.title: Dynamically embed PDF based on path provided by report data source
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I am using CR 2016 to create a contract and am trying to embed a single paged PDF which changes from contract to contract.  The report’s data source, SQL View in the case, correctly passes the path to the target PDF to the report: F:\Hunting Contracts\HuntMaps\<filename>.pdf

My issue is a very similar issue to this post which seemed to indicate this is functionality should be possible with CR 2016 but the user did not find resolution.

I have created the OLE Object two ways:

A: 

as well as

B: 

In both situations I define the default file which should only load when the dynamic path does not have a PDF to be a “No Map” file: F:\Hunting Contracts\HuntMaps\NoMap.pdf

I set Picture tab to path provided by report’s view:

When the report is previewed with data the “No Map” PDF is embedded into the report and not the target PDF.  It is at this point that I need the target singled page PDF embedded into the report instead of the default "No Map": 

I have not defined the Hyperlink tab.  A single click on the embedded "No Map" does nothing.  A double click and I’m either presented with browser to open a PDF which then opens in Adobe Reader (default app for .PDF files) or the default “No map” PDF is opened in external Adobe window; to clarify the target PDF is not used in this scenario

If I defined a hyperlink to the target file a single click on the embedded "No Map" PDF will open the target file in a separate Adobe Reader window.  I mentioned this not because a hyperlink will work, it will not, but to indicated that the target path supplies a valid file.

 

Any help or suggestions are more than appreciated.

Thanks,

Russ

entry.title: Re: Fonts not showing in Enable Now Producer
entry.content:
Hi Emily,

If the font is an OTF font, Producer will not recognize it.  Producer only recognizes TTF fonts.  If it is a TTF font, try restarting your PC and see if Producer then picks it up.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: SAP EnableNow Producer (10.8.9) can not start
entry.content:
Hi Serhii,

If you are using the Cloud version of Enable Now, it is likely that you have an issue with the requirements to run Producer.  Please confirm that your environment, including your PC, complies with the Common Browser Settings and Network Requirements in this document.

If you are using the On Premise version of Enable Now, please look at this document.

Regards
Shane

Added Service tag and removed other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Urgent: Issues with SAP Certification Renewal and Learning Hub Subscription
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am reaching out to share my recent experience and seek guidance regarding the renewal of my SAP certification and the purchase of an individual Learning Hub subscription.

I have been an SAP consultant for 13 years, working both as a partner and now as a customer. Recently, I received a notification to extend the validity of my SAP certification. Upon realizing that I needed to purchase a Learning Hub subscription, I informed my manager, who encouraged me to keep my certification valid. Consequently, I purchased an individual Learning Hub subscription on Thursday (Order ID: 0002281064).

To my surprise, I did not receive any confirmation or access to the Learning Hub even after 24 hours. I raised multiple support tickets but struggled to get a proper response. On Sunday, I finally received a response from an SAP store admin, who mistakenly treated my request as a partner request. After clarifying that it was an individual request, they informed me that they couldn't fulfill the order and suggested purchasing certification attempts instead.

I am utterly surprised and annoyed by this response and the lack of maturity from SAP Learning support. Here are my concerns:

  1. What are the guidelines for maintaining SAP certification validity, especially when changing companies? Do certifications lapse with a change in organization?
  2. Where can I find relevant support and guidance for individual certification renewal and Learning Hub subscriptions?
  3. Why is there no proper channel or guidance to address these issues?

I believe it is crucial for people to be aware of these challenges. I am on the verge of losing my certification due to the lack of proper guidance from SAP. I hope this post brings attention to the issue and helps others who might be facing similar challenges.

Thank you for your support and guidance.

SAP Learning Solution  Certification  SAP Extended Warehouse Management @SAP

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SA...
entry.content: Dear Srinivas, I am from the LMDB support and suggest to follow 1694004 - Dealing with duplicate technical system names (SIDs), which makes sure the same GUID and no need to re-configure the charm. The guide is from ECS, where I have no comments. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Unable to configure trusted RFC no matter what
entry.content: Dear Customer, Thank you for your efforts. I have suggested all from solution manager support point of view, it's suggested to wait for "NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC)" team response, or for complex issue, please contact SAP Support on BC-MID-RFC. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Map format data field FPAYHX-REF01
entry.content: Thanks for providing advice, Can you tell me how to reference t_fpayp table in the SAP Public cloud? There is no SE16N function in SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Project Budget Approval
entry.content:
Would like to add information from Development team:

I found this in the Use Case Database: https://s4hana-e6319a3c1.dispatcher.eu2.hana.ondemand.com/index.html#/project/562

From what I can read, you need SAP Build Process Automation and with this functionality you can download the project budget template, update and submit it for approval in SAP Business Technology Platform.

Basically, this is different to the CC or project budget control we own – it gives the functionality to have an approval workflow when uploading new budget templates.

entry.title: 3F0 supports settlement accounts from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502
entry.content:
Introduction

For Event-Based Production Cost Posting (3F0), in previous releases, cost distribution for non-material receiver categories, such as cost center, WBS element, and order, can only be done with the original goods issue, activity confirmation, and overhead accounts.

As of this release, you can choose By Settlement Account as the non-material receiver account determination method and assign a specific G/L account for the cost distribution.

Prerequisite

Before you can use this new feature, the necessary config should be done below in SSCUI ID 103940 for those non-MAT receiver order.

Scenario

Let’s take order 1051263 as example, use app Order Cost Details - Event-Based

Click order details to check the result of order 1051263

Firstly ,click Related Apps and navigate to Display Posting Rules - Event-Based

And the posting rule is maintained as below to settle 100% to cost center KSII_1

Go back to order details screen, the amount of Transaction: Event-Based Settlement is 110 on credit side, which is equal of summary amount Transaction: Confirmations (100) and Transaction: Overhead (10) on debit side. And the settlement G/L account is 92105300, not the original accounts.

Furthermore, let’s take an order 2001061 settled before this new feature which can only choose settlement by original account.

Go to order details, the settlement uses original account.

Conclusion

This new feature provides more flexibility for specific requirement to use settlement G/L account.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud Re-run Pricing
entry.content:
Hi,

In the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the sales pricing functions predominantly rely on condition techniques. With SAP’s out-of-the-box (OOTB) solutions, automatic pricing activation in a sales document is predetermined by standard logic. Typically, price condition values are automatically recalculated when the values of relevant condition fields are updated. Following this method, you can try making the fields your end users are modifying to impact tax to be included in one of the valid condition tables of the tax condition types as the condition fields.

Besides that, S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition currently does NOT offer a BADI similar to MV45AFZB, as available in the Private Cloud Edition. There have been discussions and enhancement requests related to this. Kindly review them and vote accordingly to help the SAP product team with the planning:

  • No alternative to trigger a re-pricing in cloud
  • badi for Pricing type Determination in Sales Document
  • No alternative for USEREXIT_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE in MV45AFZZ

It's also worth exploring the following two BADIs to check if your requirements could be partially fulfilled:

  • SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_TAX: Modification of Tax Data in Sales Document Headers
  • SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM_TAX: Modification of Tax Data in Sales Document Items

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Contract deactivation in REFX if Asset has no postings
entry.content:
Hi yes you should click on the "undo" icon. Make sure you are in change mode otherwise the button will not work. Currently the system status will show ACTV (active) and after pressing the undo button it will deactivate the contract setting it in the create (CRTE) status again. Make sure to save the changes.

Regards, Andre

entry.title: Re: 採購文件報表的淨訂購值顯示為0
entry.content: Dear Customer, Would you please find more details about the design from SAP Note below？ 0003588476 - Net Order Value Displaying as 0 in 'Display Purchasing Documents by Account Assignment' App - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: How Are Staging Tables Created in SAP Data Migration...
entry.content:
Hi @blkanth77 

Here is very comprehensive FAQ document mentioning the staging tables approach in Migration Cockpit tool.
KBA 2733253 - FAQ for SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit. Migration approach: Transfer / Migrate data using staging tables

Hope this helps.
Best regards,
Irene

entry.title: SAP Process Automation - Desktop Agent Disconnects When Signing Out of Server
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an automation in SAP Process Automation for a client and installed the SAP Desktop Agent on the client’s server. The client’s server runs continuously, as I also have a Cloud Connector installed on the same server, which operates all the time. During registration, I used my BTP user ID to register the agent and also made sure the agent service is installed. The agent is running continuously and executing jobs successfully.

However, I am facing an issue:

  • The automation works perfectly when I am logged into the server.

  • But when I sign out of the server, the agent disconnects, and the jobs stop running.

To resolve this, I have already:

  • Configured the "Open and Unlock Session Automatically" option with the server name and credentials.

  • Ensured that the Desktop Agent service is running in "unattended" mode.

Unfortunately, this did not work, and the agent still disconnects when I sign out of the server.

My Questions:

  1. How can I keep the SAP Desktop Agent running even after signing out of the server?

  2. Are there any additional server or agent configurations needed to ensure automation continues running in the background?

  3. Should I use a service account instead of a personal BTP user ID for agent registration?

Any guidance on this would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

@maheshpalavalli 
@Archana 
@Dan_Wroblewski 
@Sankara1 
@Venkat_Vyza

entry.title: Re: Problem viewing the entire structure of technical objects in Asset Viewer App
entry.content: Hi Esnowy, I have informed our expert in this area. They will check further and update in this post. Best regards, Irene

entry.title: Re: SAP TM - Container Unit Creation Question
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

Addition to above:

" Can I adjust the FUs or the Container Unit to just one destination? " - Yes you can create 1 stage ( FOB Location to Warehouse ) or 2 stage ( Source to FOB Location - Not Active for planning then FOB Location to Warehouse ) =>> Again master data route/Lane need FOB Location in Port of Load ==> Port of load - port of discharge- warehouse-> 

Stage Building Setting : Also Provided link my previous post with incoterm location connection while stage building

Please let us know if further questions.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: LTMC error during customer master upload
entry.content:
Hi @drlnsimha1411 

Usually such information raises when the same data alrady stored in staging table. Did you already upload the same set of data to staging table?

Best regards,
Irene

Hi @Qi_Liu

Somebody has suggested to me that there are additional costs to the customer for using the SUPLRDELIVPREDICT (Supplier Delivery Prediction) scenario, but I can't find any suggestion of this in the documentation.

Thanks

Robyn

entry.title: Re: open balance sheet pdf or preview layouts error
entry.content: I have solved the problem, find your sap installation package go to this path and reinstall CRRuntime

entry.title: Re: GR - Statistical FS items deliver in the content 1SG...
entry.content: Below the reference from the documentation Calculate Group Shares | SAP Help Portal For Rule-Based C/I Scenario , If the FS item S00001 is used in the percentage selection, you must manually maintain the share percentage on FS item S00001 on posting level 30. If the statistical items $000000SHD (Direct Shares) or $000000SHG (Group Shares) are used in the percentage selection, you have to run the Calculate Group Shares task as a prerequisite for processing rule-based C/I

entry.title: Re: GR - Statistical FS items deliver in the content 1SG...
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/90c07e91c7a64f328be3fd6b48955b13/79940df720e24c29b1569dda5d741bc7.html?state=DRAFT&version=2502.500

entry.title: Re: GR - Statistical FS items deliver in the content 1SG...
entry.content: You can get such FS item "$000000SHG - group shares " by running task 2141 in Consolidation monitor.

entry.content:

We have installed a new server, including hana server, B1 service server, everything is installed, but there is a problem with duplication tenant.

  • Duplicate Tenants

entry.title: SAP B1 Cloud Can't Assign Extensions
entry.content:
Greetings!

Please give me some advice.

We have installed a new server, including hana server, B1 service server, everything is installed, 

But extensions cannot be assigned.

Message: No extensions currently exist.

Service Units > Extensions > Deploy Add-ons

Tenants > Extensions > Assign > Add-ons > Select Extension: No extensions currently exist.

entry.title: Automating SAP HANA Cross SID Restore with AWS Backint and Web UI
entry.content:
Background

AWS Backint for SAP HANA was introduced as a certified backup and restore solution for SAP HANA databases running on AWS. It has simplified the process of backing up SAP HANA databases directly to Amazon S3, leveraging AWS's robust and scalable storage infrastructure. AWS backint backup integrates seamlessly with HANA Cockpit for automated backup scheduling and lifecycle management, reducing the administrative overhead associated with manual backup processes. However, cross SID restore, as a critical part of any system refresh, e.g. from production to quality assurance, still involves several manual steps, making it time-consuming and prone to errors. In this blog, we will leverage AWS Backint and Web UI to significantly streamline and automate this process, enhancing efficiency and reliability.

Challenges in SAP HANA Backint Restore Cross SID

Though AWS backint backup and same database restore are integrated with HANA Cockpit and HANA Studio, cross SID backint restore has stayed as a manual process at the time of writing. For cross SID restore with backint, the following manual steps must be performed:

  • Find Backup ID from Source Database:

Identify the specific backup ID from the source SAP HANA database that you wish to restore. We will introduce autoscanning method to upload backup metadata to SQLite database to make it easy to select the right backup ID.

  • Modify YAML File :

Adjust the YAML file associated with backint on the S3 bucket and folder on the target database. e.g. For yaml file,  /hana/shared/aws-backint-agent/aws-backint-agent-config.yaml, the following parameters need adjustment as the source bucket and folder may be different from the target.
   S3BucketName: "xyz-backint-prd"
   S3BucketFolder: "backup"

Moreover, after the restore process is completed, ensure to revert the changes, 

  • Execute Complex HANA SQL Command:

Perform HANA SQL commands within hdbsql of the target database to initiate the restore process. The SQL for the restore is long and could be confusing with various SIDs and paths. 

As seen above, it could be daunting to carry out the restore process. It often requires the collaboration of both infrastructure and basis teams to ensure accuracy and success. The manual nature of these steps increases the risk of errors and can be time-consuming to troubleshooting.  It calls for a more automated and streamlined solution. 

Solution Overview

We propose a solution that leverages:

  • Streamlit: For developing a user-friendly Web UI.
  • AWS SSM: For managing SAP systems and automating tasks.
  • SQLite: For storing SAP system info and backup metadata

We aim to simplify the restore process. Only a few clickings will be all that is needed to complete the AWS backint restore cross SID.

Prerequisites

Before we dive into the implementation, ensure you have the following:

  • Access to AWScli which can operate on HANA servers via SSM.
  • Basic knowledge of Streamlit and SQLite.
  • Python installed on your system.
  • HANA DB passwords are stored into AWS secrets manager.
  • Target DB instance can read from the source S3 bucket. 

Some Conventions in HANA

To help us identify source and target. we will adopt the following concepts and conventions commonly used in HANA literature.

  • HANA System ID (SID): The HANA System ID (SID) is a unique identifier for an SAP HANA system. It is typically 3 characters in upper case, such as PRD, QAS and DEV.
  • HANA SYSTEMDB: The central database managing system-wide operations and configurations. It is automatically created during the installation of the SAP HANA system.
  • HANA Tenant DB: Independent databases within the SAP HANA system, each serving specific applications or clients while sharing system resources. There could be several tenant DBs, but each of them will be typically identified by 3 characters, e.g. PR1, PR2, PRD.

In order to specify HANA tenant database exactly, we will have to identify it in the context of HANA system. For Example, 

  • PR1@PRD meaning Tenant DB PR1 as part of PRD HANA system
  • PRD@PRD meaning Tenant DB PRD as part of PRD HANA system

We may identify SYSTEMDB in the context of HANA system too, e.g.  SYSTEMDB@PRD to mean the SYSTEMDB of PRD HANA System.

HANA Backint Restore Tool

We have developed HANA Backint Restore Tool for SAP system refresh.

Once we select the source database and target database, the tool will automatically fetch the backup ID list along with the time of backup.  The backup records have been prefetched in SQLite database table.

It is easy to choose the Backup ID based on the date / time of the backup.

Once source, target and backup ID are selected, the Restore Tool will figure out the full roadmap to proceed.  All we need is :    Click to Proceed to Restore !

What is inside the button "Click to proceed with restore" and other buttons

Each of the buttons is called by Streamlit to run AWScli SSM document, namely  "AWS-RunShellScript". 

To come up the syntax of the CLI, we can follow the following procedures.

Go to SSM Run Command, and choose the document "AWS-RunShellScript" 

 

Enter the bash commands to execute, e.g. in case of updating YAML,

cd /hana/shared/aws-backint-agent/;
sed -i.bak -e '/S3Bucket/s/backint-qas/backint-prd/' aws-backint-agent-config.yaml

Select the instance corresponding to the target database. To automate the process, we have already pre-scanned the instance id and HANA SID/DB information in our SQLite database.

The CLI collected here is what we use in our tool.

The same goes for calling hdbsql commands to stop tenant DB and cross SID restore. By the way, the systemdb password will be extracted from secrets manager and used to login to hdbsql.

Once restore is kicked off, we can click to check the restore status. If done, we can proceed to finish post steps within SAP.  Finally, come back to the tool to revert change on YAML. Then normal operations can resume.

Conclusion

Automating the Cross SID restore process using AWS Backint and Web UI transforms a traditionally complex and manual task into a streamlined, efficient, and reliable operation. By leveraging these tools, organizations can smooth out system refreshes, enhancing overall operational efficiency.

References

https://aws.amazon.com/backint-agent/

Streamlining SAP Operations and Monitoring with SSM-SAP and Streamlit

Appendix

We have many scripts in various parts of our restore tool. Here we illustrate some of them.

SQLite 

Assume we use sqlite3  --- current at the writing. The following will open or create database backup.db as a file.

  sqlite3 backup.db

Once inside, use the following command to create backup records table:

create table backup_records (backup_id string, sid string, tid string, backup_time string, primary key (backup_id) );

Also use this command to collect backup id. Will need to go to the directory with backup.log first.

egrep 'BACKUP[ ]*backup ID' backup.log |sed 's?usr/sap/\(.*\)/SYS/.*backint/\(.*\)/202? \1 \2 ?'| awk '{printf("insert into backup_records values (\047%s\047,\047%s\047,\047%s\047, \047%s\047);\n", substr($8,1,length($8)-1), $12, $13, $1)}'|uniq

Run the resulting SQL to insert to the table inside SQLite. 

Streamlit

We illustrate with a simple selection function for backup ID.  

 

import sqlite3
import streamlit as st
import pandas as pd
import os

def run_query():
   
    st.write("### Select Backup to be restored")

    conn = sqlite3.connect('backup.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()

    query = "SELECT * FROM backup_records"
    cursor.execute(query)
    results = cursor.fetchall()
    column_names = [description[0] for description in cursor.description]

    df = pd.DataFrame(results, columns=column_names)

    selected_label = st.radio(
        "Choose the backup to restore:",
        df.index.map(lambda x: f"BACKUP_ID {df.loc[x, 'backup_id']}: {df.loc[x, 'backup_time']}"),
        format_func=lambda x: x
    )

    if selected_label:
        # Extract the index from the label
        selected_index = int(selected_label.split()[1][:-1])
        selected_row = df[df['backup_id'] == selected_index].iloc[0]
    else:
        st.info("No row selected.")
    conn.close()

    backup_id = selected_row.backup_id
    st.write("Backup ID selected: "+ str(backup_id))
 
tool_selection = {
    "SAP Refresh: HANA Backint Restore Tool": run_query
}

selected_page = st.sidebar.selectbox("Choose a SAP Toolkit for AWS", tool_selection.keys())
tool_selection[selected_page]()

It is still a plan to share the codes for monitoring and restore after code cleanup. Appreciate the patience.

entry.title: Can Fiori apps be used to process the shipment of batch-managed products?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Currently, when processing the shipment of batch-managed products in the sales process, we can only use VL01N, as the Fiori shipping app displays an error message preventing its use. I would like to ask why the Fiori app cannot support this functionality and is there a solution to this?

⭣This app is 「Pick Outbound Delivery」

 

Thanks

Noni

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Concur with SAP Analytics Cloud and Build an Analytical Story

Do you need WEB SERVICES SUBSCRIPTION in Concur?

entry.title: Re: C+514 Internal error in function module CKM3_UPDATE
entry.content:
Please check SAP KBA-- I guess one of corrections will be applicable to your version.

3254123 - Internal error in function module CKM3_UPDATE with delayed enqueue - SAP for Me

entry.title: PPF- Autopack
entry.content: I have a task which is, PPF: Pack for Inbound delivery, I have to create a custom action definition so as to implement the method for autopack. I have found a standard method for autopack, but I'm facing issue in implementing that in the action definition. Does anyone know how to implement it in the action definition?

entry.title: Re: How to setup for joule in SAP BTP- BAS
entry.content:
Great to hear you're exploring Joule Chat within Eclipse for ABAP development!

Please note so far only Joule Chat is available in Eclipse ADT. Rest of Joule features win be gradually rolled out to Eclipse ADT.

There are a few key prerequisites to get it working:

---

✅ Prerequisites to Enable Joule in Eclipse for ABAP

1. Eclipse Version

Ensure you're using the 2025 or latest supported Eclipse version with full ADT support.

 

2. ABAP Development Tools (ADT)

Install or update to the latest ADT plugins.

Use this update site: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/latest

 

3. System Connection

You must be connected to an SAP system that supports Joule.

Currently, this is available on certain SAP S/4HANA or BTP trial/test tenants where Joule services are activated.

 

4. SAP Account & Permissions

Make sure your SAP user has the necessary roles and authorizations to access Joule features.

 

 

---

⚙️ How to Enable or Access Joule Chat in Eclipse

Once everything above is in place:

Go to the "Joule Chat" view in Eclipse:

Window > Show View > Other > Joule > Joule Chat


If it doesn’t appear, it might be due to missing system support or permissions.

 

---

ℹ️ Notes

Joule is still being rolled out, and may not be available on all systems yet.

If you're on a local/standalone system, Joule may not show up until SAP enables broader access.

For the richest experience, SAP Business Application Studio also supports Joule natively.

entry.title: Re: How to setup for joule in SAP BTP- BAS
entry.content: Hi @ShahidSiddiqui Can you explain step 3 in more detail what exactly i need, i have s user id which have sap build .

entry.title: What configuration need to CHECK PRINT in SAP S4HANA Public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We want to do check print for outgoing payment in SAP S4HANA Public cloud. We tried through Automatic Payment program (APP) with selecting payment method Check (C), But their is no option found for check printing output.

Please suggest us the right way for CHECK PRINT in Public cloud.

Thank you.

#FinanceExpert

@FinanceExpert

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge March - SAP Community Escape House - AI 🤖🧠
entry.content: finally able to escape room after multiple try. thank you for super challenges. It keeps me engage and motived to fix issues. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Creating Status Profile
entry.content: It's missing function. Suggest you create feature request.

entry.title: Re: Business Application Studio - modules not recognized...
entry.content: The issue has been resolved for me. Perhaps a fix update was performed. I hope it works for you too.

entry.title: Re: Production Order consumption from wrong place
entry.content:
When you do the CO11N or Goods issue, the default storage location is in the production order, which defined by the Production version and MRP2 View, and your expectation is that when you do the goods issue, the storage location must be "Storage location" in production order.

You can use a BADI "MB_MIGO_BADI"  with T-code "SE18" to do an enhancement to check the storages location in Goods issue must be the "storage location" in production order, thank you!

 

Operation Steps

  1. Create a Class: Use the SE24 transaction code in the SAP system to create the  class ex.  "zcl_261_stock_location_check".
  2. Implement the BADI: Use the SE18 transaction code to find MB_MIGO_BADI, create a new implementation, and specify this class as the implementation class.
  3. Activate: Activate the class and the BADI implementation.

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting are the entered comments in GRDC avai...
entry.content: Sorry the comment on GRDC is only possible in Form. You cannot import them to others system like SAC.

entry.title: Re: Restore deleted chart of accounts
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi NO the exact steps that i performed are i enter to OBD4 then new entries, create 5 chart of account groups then saved it. but when i see the the groups that i created were wrong i enter to OBD4 than FILA(the company that i created) then select all then delete the groups.

entry.title: Re: CHARM and JIRA Integration
entry.content:
Hi,

In standard, there are no documents for the integration between ChaRM and JIRA, it is a consulting question. I would recommend please involve consulting service team for specific help.

BR.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Public Cloud, Group Reporting: What is tar...
entry.content: To set up versions J10, J1R, J1S, J20, and J2R, refer to the instructions in the 'Additional Settings for Multiple Group Currencies and Restatement (Optional)' section of 1SG test script and create them manually.

entry.title: Re: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Custom...
entry.content:
Hi
Unfortunately, the role BUP001 is not added automatically when migrating the contact persons.
We have struggled with the same issue: Solved: Migration of contact persons - SAP Community
You will have to find a way to enrich the contact persons with the BUP001 role as a post-migration step. 
Consider looking into some of the Mass apps or transactions.  

Best Regards,
Gitte

entry.title: Re: Delete Homepage Career Site Builder
entry.content:
Thank you for verifying that you can't delete a site. That's a shame.

I don't think posting the same content as on the global site is good, as it suggests to the google algorithm that there are duplicate websites which is bad for the seo ranking. 
Hopefully SAP will consider the option to delete homepages, as it would be very helpful!

entry.title: Re: Mapping of SAML attributes with XSUAA JWT in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hi Prashant,

Amazing blog! It was of great help! I was able to retrieve these attributes from the service in DEV subaccount consuming them from Postman and Workzone but is strange that deploying the service in TEST subaccount, I'm able to retrieve these attributes calling the services from Postman but not calling the services from Workzone. Any idea with some missing configuration? Maybe in Workzone?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: System not responding when export from SAP to Excel
entry.content: Hi, just wondering if your problem got resolved ? My SAP had same problem now...

entry.title: Re: Factory Action on multiple instances does not refresh...
entry.content: @ClearQueries thanks for the video, but unfortunately it does not help. I checked and - besides you using UUIDs as a key in the view - we are doing exactly the same, as you can see from the code i posed in the initial post. I also confirmed in debugger, that the correct cid and key is set. Do you have a complete working sample of local annotations in any repository i could check out? To see if mine somehow differs from a working solution?

entry.title: Billing Block on SAP ISU
entry.content:
In SAP IS-U (Industry Solution for Utilities), a Billing Block is a technical setting used to stop the processing of billing documents for certain customers or contract accounts. It serves as a control tool to prevent bill generation until the issue causing the block is resolved. Billing blocks are commonly applied for reasons such as inaccurate meter readings, unusually high consumption, outstanding payments, or data inconsistencies.

 

Before we proceed, let’s clarify some essential SAP ISU terms:

  • Contract Account (CA): The customer’s account for utility services.
  • Contract: The agreement for utility services between the provider and the customer.

Now, let’s move on to applying a billing block.

  • Find the Contract via Contract Account
  1. Open Transaction Code CAA3.
  2. Enter the Contract Account (CA) and press Enter.
  3. Click on Environment at the top menu, and you will see the associated Contract.
  • Apply the Billing Block
  1. Open Transaction Code ES21.
  2. Enter the Contract you found in Step 1 and press Enter.
  3. Navigate to Page 2.
  4. Enter the Bill Block Reason in the designated field.
  5. Click Save to confirm the changes.

A success message will appear at the bottom of the screen.

Thanks for reading.

entry.title: API Error"Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M50RVE"
entry.content:
HI 各位老師，我目前想透過 JournalEntryBulkCreateReques來寫入KR的供應商發票，但遇到了錯誤訊息"Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M50RVE"，以下是我的Request內容，再請各位老師協助。

<soapenv:Envelope
 xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"
 xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
    <soapenv:Header/>
    <soapenv:Body>
        <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
                <CreationDateTime>2024-07-24T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntryCreateRequest>
                <MessageHeader>
                    <CreationDateTime>2024-07-24T11:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
                </MessageHeader>
                <JournalEntry>
                    <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>
                    <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>
                    <AccountingDocumentType>KR</AccountingDocumentType>
                    <DocumentHeaderText>供應商發票測試</DocumentHeaderText>
                    <CreatedByUser>Martin</CreatedByUser>
                    <CompanyCode>6310</CompanyCode>
                    <DocumentDate>2024-05-15</DocumentDate>
                    <PostingDate>2024-07-15</PostingDate>
                    <TaxDeterminationDate>2024-07-15</TaxDeterminationDate>
                    <DocumentReferenceID>ZW35429603</DocumentReferenceID>
                    <CreditorItem>
                        <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                        <Creditor>TW2503211</Creditor>
                        <AltvRecnclnAccts>21100000</AltvRecnclnAccts>
                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="TWD">-24000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                        <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                    </CreditorItem>
                    <Item>
                        <GLAccount>12600000</GLAccount>
                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="TWD">4000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                        <Tax>
                            <TaxCode>VZ</TaxCode>
                        </Tax>
                        <AccountAssignment>
                            <CostCenter>63101101</CostCenter>
                        </AccountAssignment>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <GLAccount>61401000</GLAccount>
                        <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="TWD">20000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                        <Tax>
                            <TaxCode>VZ</TaxCode>
                        </Tax>
                        <AccountAssignment>
                            <CostCenter>63101101</CostCenter>
                        </AccountAssignment>
                        <DocumentItemText>123</DocumentItemText>
                    </Item>
                    <!--<ProductTaxItem>
      <TaxCode>V6</TaxCode>
      <TaxItemClassification>VST</TaxItemClassification>
      <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="TWD">1200</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
      <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>
      <TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy currencyCode="TWD">24000</TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy>
                        <ProductiveTaxText>test</ProductiveTaxText>
     </ProductTaxItem>:-->
                </JournalEntry>
            </JournalEntryCreateRequest>
        </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
    </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

entry.content:
Hi @RobynCouch ,

As far as I know, these machine learning scenarios have been introduced years ago, they are not license required. They are not LLM based which might be another story.

Regards,

Qi

entry.title: Re: Getting Started with Edge Integration Cell on AWS: A Setup Guide Using SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Amazon offers EKS Anywhere (Kubernetes On-Premises - Amazon EKS Anywhere - AWS) to truly deploy Kubernetes on-premise (in one's company's own data centre). Can BTP Edge Integration Cell (EIC) run on EKS Anywhere? Are there particular gotcha's for such deployment?

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP’s Product Strategy for Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) Solutions
entry.content: Indeed, SAPs commitment to GRC (Access Control, Risk- and Audit management, Business Integrity Screening and UI-Masking and -logging) for SAP S/4HANA extends to the lifecycle of SAP S/4HANA. All customers can count on future releases. Tax Compliance is an exception, as this module is captured by the SAP product SAP Risk- and Compliance Management (RAM), our SaaS-product based on BTP. All customers using Tax Compliance On Premises are encouraged to make use of the easy to deploy and fast time to value application RAM going forward. Additionally, SAP RAM gives all customers also the option to move their management of controls into the cloud. This gives companies a choice for a fully operated as-a-service software for GRC in addition to GRC for Private Cloud as described in this article.

entry.title: SSCUI: Maintain Route Determination维护路线确定
entry.content:
功能介绍

S/4HANA Cloud供应链中路线确定是一个重要流程, 用于自动为外向交货选择合适的运输路线。如果路线确定执行不正确, 会对业务产生以下影响:

  • 路线决定了关键的运输信息,如运输时间和方式。错误的路线可能导致交货日期不准确和不适当的运输方法。
  • 需要人工干预: 如果系统持续确定错误的路线, 可能需要频繁的手动更正,增加工作量和出错可能性。
  • 成本计算不准确: 由于路线影响运输成本, 错误的确定可能导致成本计算和定价不准确。

验证路线确定因素的配置：

  • 装运点数据(国家和出发区)
  • 销售凭证和客户主数据中的装运条件
  • 物料主数据中的运输组
  • 收货方数据(国家和运输区)
  • 路线是否在路线主数据中正确维护

当客户维护了错误路线确定记录时，客户需要删除或者更改这条记录，避免对客户带来糟糕的用户体验。

2502版本更新后，客户可以在SSCUI:Maintain Route Determination维护路线确定中删除不合适的记录。

感谢观看

entry.title: Re: certain report cannot detect ApplicationResources.pro...
entry.content:
Hi Karl,

Thank you for your detailed instructions—it worked like a charm!

Additionally, I discovered another solution by modifying the .rptdesign XML as follows:

<simple-property-list name="includeResource">
<value>ApplicationResources</value>
</simple-property-list>

Thank you again!

Best, Jessica

entry.title: What is the purpose of recognition and re-recognition validation?
Re: How to convert .PPTX to PDF
entry.content: Search for BC-XDC interface. That's SAP way to send attachments to external converter for printing.

entry.title: Mastering Test Data Container Usage in SAP Post-Upgrade Testing: A Comprehensive Guide
entry.content:
SAP Post-Upgrade Tests (PUT) is a crucial step in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud upgrade process, enabling system stability and business continuity. One of the most important factors influencing the efficiency of this phase is the effective use of Test Data Container (TDC). When leveraged correctly, TDCs can streamline automation efforts, reduce manual intervention, and enhance test accuracy and efficacy.

As an Expert in Test Automation Tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, I’m excited to share practical insights and best practices on optimizing TDC usage in PUT.

The Foundation: Identifying PUT Processes

The journey to efficient TDC usage begins with a comprehensive inventory of all PUT processes selected for execution. This initial step is crucial as it lays the groundwork for effective test data management within your TDC variant. By having a clear picture of all processes, you can ensure that no test scenario is overlooked and that your test data strategy is all-encompassing.

The Devil in the Details: Reviewing and Maintaining TDC Bindings

Once you have your process list, it's time to dive deep into each test process. The goal here is to identify and maintain all TDC bindings meticulously. This involves ensuring that all required and relevant field values are accurately maintained in the standard variant 'Variant_XX' of the respective standard TDCs. This step is critical in minimising data inconsistencies that could potentially derail your test execution.

Snapshot 1 showing relevant filed values being maintained in Variant_XX

The Safety Net: System Check on PUT Trigger

As you trigger PUT, the system performs an automatic validation - a crucial safety net in your testing process. This check ensures that all necessary TDC binding data is available in the standard TDC variant. If all bound fields have maintained data, the system proceeds with test execution using this data, bypassing the data picking logic. However, if any field is missing, the system falls back to the intelligent data picking logic, ensuring uninterrupted test execution.

The Time-Saver: Auto-Population of TDC Data

To further streamline the process, SAP offers an option for auto-population of bound test data containers. By providing consent, you allow the system to automatically* fill the standard TDC variant 'Variant_XX' with test data from the data picking logic  for standard post-upgrade test automates, if data isn't already maintained. This feature not only reduces manual effort but also ensures a more structured and automated test data management process.

Snapshot 2 showcasing provision of consent for auto-population of test data in Post-Upgrade Tests app

*Please review the automatically filled data in the variant for your automates

 The Maintenance Routine: Regular Data Review

As with any robust testing strategy, regular maintenance is key. For each release, it's crucial to review the data maintained in the standard variant and update it as necessary before triggering PUT. This proactive approach minimizes failures due to data inconsistencies and keeps your testing process smooth and efficient.

Conclusion:

Implementing these best practices for TDC usage in SAP Post-Upgrade Testing (PUT) can significantly enhance your testing efficiency. By leveraging system validations, automated data population, and structured test processes, you can achieve seamless execution while reducing manual effort and maintaining high data accuracy.

Remember, the key to successful PUT lies not just in automation, but in smart automation. By following these guidelines, you're not just running tests; you're optimizing your entire testing strategy, saving time, reducing errors, and ultimately, delivering a more robust SAP system to your organization.

As SAP systems continue to evolve, so too must our testing strategies. Stay tuned for more insights on SAP test automation, and don't hesitate to share your experiences with TDC usage in the comments below. Together, we can continue to refine and improve our SAP testing practices.

Useful Links :

  • Test Data Container Help Document
  • Post-Upgrade Tests Help Document

entry.title: Introducing SAP Application Extension Methodology version 2.3
entry.content:
What’s New for SAP Application Extension Methodology

With the SAP Application Extension Methodology version 2.3, we have made some changes to the technology-agnostic extension tasks and refined the Extension Technology Mapping. For example, we introduced new extension tasks around the topic of Event-Driven Architecture.

If you are still using an older version of the Technology Mapping, I highly recommend checking out our new version and to learn about the latest innovations and technologies on SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Technology Platform.

 

Extension Architecture Guide

Our Methodology is part of the SAP BTP Guidance Framework. With this Framework, we provide a central access point for architects, developers, and administrators to build and run enterprise-grade solutions on SAP BTP.

We now offer a dedicated topic on “Getting Started with Extensibility”. This guide provides a simplified introduction to extending SAP’s ERP offerings. It outlines the SAP S/4HANA Cloud extensibility model with SAP Business Technology Platform, which applies to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (GROW with SAP), SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (RISE with SAP), and SAP S/4HANA.

Getting Started with Extensibility

With SAP Build, you can create extensions that run on-stack in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, and SAP S/4HANA, and/or side-by-side on SAP BTP.

Depending on your use cases and the capabilities required, you can choose a flexible combination of on-stack and side-by-side extensions.

 

Next Steps:

Learn more about the SAP Application Extension Methodology on the SAP Help Portal.
Learn more about the Extension Architecture Guide on the SAP Help Portal.

Feel free to like, comment and ask your questions!

Talk to you soon,
Marco

Product Manager SAP Business Technology Platform
Join me online: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcomatha/

entry.title: Re: SoD without GRC Tool
entry.content:
Hi Caiogvn,

indeed that is difficult, that's why Access Governance tools for SAP have been developed 🙂

Nevertheless, you should be able to create a rough manual-intensive and error-prone tool extracting data about users and roles from an SAP system and using e.g. MS Excel.
But it requires a lot of work anyway.

Hope it helps and that your company can decide to adopt a GRC tool soon!

entry.title: Re: New Trusted Authentication for Single Server installation and Entra Id
entry.content: Hi John,

entry.title: Re: Widgets in SAP Business One HANA retrieves informatio...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

all the widgets and KPIs are based on queries. From your description it would seem that these queries have a hardcoded schema in them, so I would guess these are user-created KPIs and widgets. It is best practice to avoid using the chema in Queries when writing them in the client, as it would automatically take the data from current database.

Example of a hardcoded schema:

SELECT * FROM "SCHEMA"."ORDR"

To get the data from the current database you can simply use:

SELECT * FROM "ORDR"

So the solution in your case would be to remove the database name from queries these widgets are based on.

 

BR,

Matija

entry.title: Re: New Trusted Authentication for Single Server installation and Entra Id
entry.content: Hi John, thank you very much for your message. What I find a bit frustrating that SAP has provided a SAP Security Patch Day in February, stating that is important to update BO... https://support.sap.com/en/my-support/knowledge-base/security-notes-news/february-2025.html

entry.title: DMS Content Server migration to BTP DMS Repository
entry.content:
General Introduction

ABCD company - DMS Content Server migration to BTP DMS Repository - 

Steps

  1. Upgrade existing non-production Content Server 6.5 to Content Server 7.5x
  2. Connect non-production upgraded Content Server 7.5x to ECC6 non-production System(s).
    1. Please verify with Basis team that you can connect upgraded Content Server 7.5x to ECC6 system.
  3. BASIS team shall test and validate upgraded server in ECC6 non-production System(s).
  4. Connect non-production upgraded Content Server 7.5x to S/4 non-production System(s).
  5. Migrate limited number of attachments from upgraded Content Server connected to S/4 non-production System to BTP DMS Repository option.
  6. Upgrade existing production Content Server 6.5 to Content Server 7.5x
  7. Connect production Content Server 7.5x to existing ECC6 Production System.
    1. Please verify with Basis team that you can connect upgraded Content Server 7.5x to ECC6 system.
  8. During S/4 go-live cutover activities, we should change connection of upgraded production Content Server 7.5x from ECC6 Production to S/4 Production System.
  9. After go-live, migrate attachments from upgraded Content Server connected to S/4 production System to BTP DMS Repository option.

Please find the Architecture diagram below 

STEP 1:
create a new BTP subaccount or use the existing BTP subaccount 

SAP BTP Cockpit 

1. Sub-account Overview > Enable Cloud Foundry

2. Create an SPACE > add users to SPACE
3. Entity Assignments and select Entities

Global Account > Entitlements > Entity  Assignments

Click on Configure Entitlements

Click on Add service Plans

Sub-Account > Entitlements > Add Service Plans

Go to SUB account and add into the account

you can see the Services in Entity Assignments

in service marketplace you can see the Application

Instance and Subscription > Create New instance or subscription

click on new instance or subscription & click Next

Instance creating is in progress it took 3 mins to complete 

create Key for instance

 Before that u need to create an Role

Create Role Collection and assign roles

Click on ROLE, select on required Roles need to be added to Role collections

add to Role collection

After save click on back on the DMS_PRD and select another role and ADD

Click on Instances and Subscriptions

Service key need to create

after that login to POST man or Accelerator to create an API 

i have used the Accelerator 

Login to Accelerator: please find the link below for the Accelerator 

Try Out | Administrative Operations | SAP Business Accelerator Hub 

RUN the API successful

 

STEP 2 

login to S/4 HANA system 

Login to BACKEND system S/4 and execute the T-code

OA2C_CONFIG

Activate the services Json

RFC is successful now create the OACO

Create Content Repository in OACO

OR

you can use Onboard Repository using POST man 

 You may use https://www.base64encode.org/  in case encoding is not working in POST / POSTMAN

Note--------------------------------------

Ensure that user executing 'list repositories' or 'onboard repositories' in 'SAP Business Accelerator Hub' shall have required roles assigned in respective sub-account

-------------------------------------------------------------------------

technical configuration steps for BTP DMS, based on my experience. I recently had the opportunity to configure DMS for a client, where I faced several challenges. Through this process, I documented my learnings, and the steps involved.

Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need further clarification.

Best regards,
Allam Prabhu

entry.title: Re: Sales rebate processing - condition contract pricing
entry.content:
Hi Patryk,

I created an incident since this is very urgent. Unfortunately, a custom condition is not possible in condition contracts in S4HANA Public cloud. 

 "A custom condition type can be created in cloud. However, to use it in a condition contract it needs to be
assigned to a condition type group and a condition table. This SSCUI screen is not released for modification 
in cloud version. Therefore, the custom condition type cannot be used in condition contracts."

BR 
Katja

CHAMP11

Rs.200

App Name is here

BatBall11

BatBall11 Referr𝑎l Code  

CHAMP11

Refer and Earn

Rs.200

entry.title: Re: External Numbering in RAP.
entry.content:
Hi Gireesh,

The issue that you are facing might be because a draft instance already exists with the same external key that you are trying to create.

Regards,

Arun

entry.title: Deploy SAP Fiori App on S/4 HANA Public Cloud with SAP Business Application Studio (BAS)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a weird problem when trying to deploy SAP Fiori app through SAP business application studio on S/4 HANA public cloud development tenant (080).  I am following the below tutorial but getting the error on Step 5 during the deployment.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-s4hanacloud-procurement-purchasereq-shop-ui.html

I have developed RAP application in Eclipse IDE and have connected SAP BTP and S/4 HANA cloud application to deploy the application. App has built successfully but when trying to deploy same, getting the below error.

error builder:custom deploy-to-abap Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'bind').
Please help me to understand the error and the steps to resolve the same.

Thank you in advance!

Thanks.

entry.title: Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct
entry.content:
Could you please tell me how to register an order slip and how to process it afterwards when direct shipping to the supplier is done at the time of ordering, rather than starting from an order receipt?
I understand that BDK and BD3 Scope Items are applicable when ordering.
I would be grateful if you could provide me with Scope Items and materials that describe direct shipping to the supplier when ordering.

entry.title: SAP IBP Production Source Item Sub standard integration
entry.content:
Good day

Is there any standart dataflow (for example using addon) for integration alternative materials from S/4 to SAP IBP - CPI DS?
Masterdata Type - Production Source Item Sub

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: FIORI APP Preise verwalten - Verkauf F4111
entry.content: Hello Ariane4everSuccess,

entry.title: Re: In SAP S4/HANA Public Cloud, What is A10 and how do I...
entry.content: The group currency in SAP pre-delivered cons. versions is determined by cloud customers when specifying the group currency in "Primary Financial Settings". Group currency varies customer by customer. 1SG test script provides data sets and expected consolidation result with group currency EURO.  To provide generic test procedures fit for all cloud customers, testers are asked to create a consolidation version A10 with group currency EURO. As the note said, this is for testing purpose with SAP provided data sets.

entry.title: Re: FIORI APP Preise verwalten - Verkauf F4111
entry.content:
Hello Ariane4everSuccess,

can you please describe the error in more detail. Ideally with a screenshot of the error message.

Best regards

Patrick

entry.title: Re: SAP S4HANA Public Cloud, Group Reporting: What is tar...
entry.content:
Hello 

the version J10 is used to show and explain business scenario based on extension version(s). J10 is the standard version for extension versions as described in test script. 

the version J10 should be available as of release 2408. If scope item 1SG is activated in a prior release, you have to copy J10 from Y10 and adjust as described in test script. 

If version J10 is not available and you cannot copy from Y10 to J10, raise an incident component FIN-CS-CO-2CL.

entry.title: Re: IBP - Standard method to Deleting key Figures and the...
entry.content:
Hi 

Since you also want to delete the Planning Objects, I suggest you use the Purge Key Figure, which has an option to do so.

Moreover, since Snap Shot KF is used only on 1 Planning Level, Purge KF seems to be the best option.

 

V
